rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption levels. Gov't Code §2306.115 governs board annual budget adoption deadlines—unrelated subject matter, no conflict.
quote: If the board does not adopt the annual budget on or before September 1, the budget for the preceding year remains in effect until a new budget is adopted.
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and board budget adoption rule.
